Video.summary: The team from Wired2Fish delivers the goods on how to catch the biggest fish—wherever or whenever you're casting lines.
Video.grandparentTitle: Wired2Fish | Baits and Gear For the Biggest Catch
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing expert Jim Crowley teaches us how to design and build our own rigs for every freshwater species.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Angler's Workshop
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin takes viewers to the top destinations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass With Dustin Wilks 2024
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Stoked on Fishing crew takes you to the most amazing locations for some epic saltwater action.
Video.grandparentTitle: The Best of Saltwater Slam
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The Lindner team takes viewers to the best locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim Crowley interviews top anglers and industry insiders from around the world of angling.
Video.grandparentTitle: Slickfish Radio
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jim shows how effective the drop shot can be on Bass during the extreme heat of Summer.
Video.grandparentTitle: Jim Crowley Outdoors | When its Hot... Drop Shot!.mp4
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: FLW Touring pro Justin Kerr joins Jarrett on the Colorado River for a solid day catching large and smallmouth bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — River Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Paul and Ray return to a remote Northern Ontario lake for the final shoot of the season. Facing a tricky beaver dam crossing, they bring in Dan and Ben for extra hands and safety. The day delivers incredible walleye and bass action, capped off with a shore lunch featuring perfectly seasoned walleye courtesy of Outdoor Flavours.
Video.grandparentTitle: Remote Lakes, Big Fish, Epic Days
Video.title: FishON | Last Cast Walleye Pursuit

Video.summary: It’s Walleye Time! This week, we're heading to Peshtigo, Wisconsin, to fish for post-spawn walleye. Joined by his guide clients, Larry teaches the ins and outs of how to catch these finicky fish!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors | Post-Spawn Walleye
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jeremy Smith and Dan Lindner demonstrate how finding and catching magnum-sized mid-summer crappies can be easier than you think
Video.grandparentTitle: Angling Buzz - Summertime Crappies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In the thrilling Season 7 finale, Paul & Perry and the team venture deep into Northern Ontario, using a Polaris Ranger to access a remote lake with high hopes for walleye. However, the day takes a surprising turn as Northern Pike steal the show with their spirited action. The adventure doesn’t end there—a bonus portage into another lake offers a chance to explore uncharted waters. It’s a fitting conclusion to a season filled with the unexpected and unforgettable.
Video.grandparentTitle: FishON! | Remote Escapes: Pike Frenzy and Hidden Lake Explorations
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Fishing legend Hank Parker take viewers to the most secluded locations for the biggest fish.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hank Parker Fishing
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Learn the best gear and strategies to target the biggest fish in the pre-spawn spring angling season.
Video.grandparentTitle: Spring Fishing Tips and Tricks
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Kim returns to Cheyenne Ridge Signature Lodge on South Dakota's scenic Lake Oahe to target transient post-spawn smallmouth bass. Strike King's "Dream Shot Worm" is the featured lure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Hook 'n Look — Roamers at the Ridge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Al Lindner and Jeremy Smith take to the Great Plains in search of giant smallmouth bass, demonstrating how a one-two punch of trolling and casting jerkbaits can yield big rewards.
Video.grandparentTitle: Lindner's Angling - Jerkin' Smallies
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe-Caddo Lake
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapman delivers top tips on how to catch the biggest fish in the best spots.
Video.grandparentTitle: Brent Chapman’s Pro vs Joe -Missouri Smackdown
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Hook Em'
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Hook Em'
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Brent Chapmans Pro vs Joe Father Son Challenge Part 1
Video.grandparentTitle: Pro vs Joe - Father Son Challenge
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: If you're a bass fisherman, you have most likely heard of the world-class Lake El Salto. Dave Brown from Okuma Fishing Tackle and professional bass fisherman Todd Kline rally up with Savage Gear and test out their rat and duck lures on this Stoked On Fishing adventure.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Largemouth Bass Fishing at Lake El Salto, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Some of the best Sportfishing in the world takes place in Costa Rica. Especially out of a village named Nosara. The Nosara area is far from commercial fishing lanes and off tourists' beaten paths and is a best kept secret fishing and surfing destination. On this Stoked On Fishing adventure, we fish for Tuna, Billfish, and Dorado.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Costa Rica's Best Kept Fishing Secret, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stoked On Fishing heads back to La Bocana, Mexico, for some epic offshore fishing and find yellowtail, dorado, and wahoo.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Offshore Fishing In La Bocana Mexico, Part Two
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Shaw fishes New York's crystalline St. Lawrence River for smallmouth bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast — St Lawrence Smallmouths
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this episode we pass on the angling tradition to the next generation with some Louisiana bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: One More Cast - Passing the Tradition
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: The team heads down to Florida for a flats boat fly fishing in the mangroves of the Everglades.
Video.grandparentTitle: Sport FishingTV | Fly Fishing The Everglades
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Stoked On Fishing heads back to La Bocana, Mexico, for some epic offshore fishing and find yellowtail, dorado, and wahoo.
Video.grandparentTitle: Stoked on Fishing - Offshore Fishing In La Bocana Mexico
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: U.S. Marine Chad Stuhr grew up with a love for the outdoors, and a love for his country. Host Ben Olsen takes him back to his roots with a day of fishing and learns how Chad carried on the tradition of service started with his father.
Video.grandparentTitle: Operation Fishing Freedom - Marine Veteran Chad Stuhr
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Jarrett teams up with Bassmaster Elite Series pro Jared Lintner on Californias Clear Lake. Top water frogs and punching plastics are the way to go
Video.grandparentTitle: Jarrett Edwards Outdoors — Bass in the Grass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: In this action-packed video, we not only showcase the thrill of reeling in monster crappies but also share invaluable tips and techniques to enhance your chances of landing that trophy-sized catch. From selecting the right bait to understanding the behavior of crappies in winter conditions, we cover it all to help you become a more successful ice angler. - Watch closely as we demonstrate how the picker boat revolutionizes ice fishing, allowing us to explore untouched fishing grounds with precision and safety.
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Mastering Crappie Fishing: Tips for Landing Big Slabs

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Mastering Crappie Fishing: Tips for Landing Big Slabs
Larry Smith Outdoors | Mastering Crappie Fishing: Tips for Landing Big Slabs
Larry Smith Outdoors | Mastering Crappie Fishing: Tips for Landing Big Slabs

Video.summary: We're heading to Lake Gogebic this week to find some GIANT Perch and walleye! Joined by Chris Fish and Justin Soffa, this will surely be a fishing smackdown!
Video.grandparentTitle: Larry Smith Outdoors
Video.title: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch

Image.alt: Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch
Larry Smith Outdoors | Lake Gogebic Perch

Video.summary: Jim visits Cast Industries to see how lure molds are made. Then he visits Lure Parts Online to show you how to pour your own soft plastic baits.
Video.grandparentTitle: Angler's Workshop | Making Lure Molds & Pouring soft plastics
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin gambles with a long run in search of big pre-spawn bass
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Finding Pre-Spawn Bass
Video.title: Episode 1

Video.summary: Dustin explains the lures and locations to best catch post-spawn bass.
Video.grandparentTitle: Catching Bass | Post Spawn Bass
Video.title: Episode 1
